message:
fix: scan clusters concurrently in DeviceTracker so reachable clusters aren't blocked (#3279)

The device tracker scanned all clusters sequentially with a single 30s
shared context timeout. With many unreachable clusters (each consuming
5-10s waiting for connection), the deadline expired before reaching
healthy clusters — resulting in an always-empty Hardware Health card.

Fix: scan clusters concurrently with a 5s per-cluster timeout, streaming
snapshots via a channel so inventory data is available as soon as each
reachable cluster responds rather than waiting for all to complete.

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
